name: SaraGideon.com
subject: We just launched a new ad!
body:
Video inside.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cbf/4bef7a87/6b38261c/287fd878/1227656007/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friend -
On day one of this campaign, Sara Gideon made a promise:
**We aren 't taking any money from corporate PACs. **
That commitment is central to our campaign -- so we launched a new ad to make sure Mainers in every corner of the state understand why this matters so much to us.
**[Watch the ad here, and then make a grassroots contribution to support our people-powered campaign:](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cbf/4bef7a87/6b38261c/287fd87f/1227656007/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjctZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-corporatepacad?refcode=em191027-full")**
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cbf/4bef7a87/6b38261c/287fd87f/1227656007/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjctZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-corporatepacad?refcode=em191027-full")
Mainers are ready for a leader who puts our state before special interests and corporate PACs. They're sick and tired of the influence money has over our politicians and elections.
That's why Sara Gideon is powering her campaign through small-dollar grassroots donations -- so it will always be clear who she is working for in Washington:
**The people of Maine.**
\- Team Sara
****[WATCH THE AD](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cbf/4bef7a87/6b38261c/287fd87f/1227656007/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjctZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-corporatepacad?refcode=em191027-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cbf/4bef7a87/6b38261c/287fd87e/1227656007/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cbf/4bef7a87/6b38261c/287fd87d/1227656007/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: This could put us at a major disadvantage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Did you see this?

First, Joe Biden flipped on his own No Super PACs Pledge — deciding to
encourage billionaires to form a massive one that can bankroll his
campaign with unlimited contributions from corporations and special
interests.

Then, CNN asked Beto if he would do the same in order to compete with
Biden trying to buy this primary — but Beto said, “There is no room for
PACs or Super PACs. We’re running a grassroots campaign.”

Now, a lot of people are saying this could put us at a major disadvantage
— unless our grassroots movement proves otherwise. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40253?refcode=ema20191027-63988&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=63988%2E444211%2Ea0sDLq ]Help us win the
right way, and show how powerful grassroots donors can be: Chip
in $3 or anything you can now to get Beto’s back on this.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40253?refcode=ema20191027-63988&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=63988%2E444211%2Ea0sDLq ]Contribute $3

Super PACs can receive UNLIMITED contributions from corporations and
special interests. So it’s no wonder CNN asked Beto if he’d reconsider
taking these giant checks. But take a look at the transcript of what he
said:

"We see far too much influence from those who can buy access and
increasingly outcomes in our legislation and in our elections...There is
no room for political action committees, or super PACs...I haven't taken
PAC money for more than five years. We're running a grassroots campaign.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40253?refcode=ema20191027-63988&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=63988%2E444211%2Ea0sDLq ]Everyone who has gone to betoorourke.com and donated
$3 has fueled this effort to make sure that we can get
out to voters. That's the way that our democracy should work, and I'm
going to stay with my commitment not to take PAC money or super PAC
money in this race."

We’re proud of Beto’s answer. He is taking a bold stand against the
corruption, greed, special interests, and corporations that have
influenced our elections — and Washington, DC — for far too long. That’s
the leadership we need.

But it’s clear that we’re now competing against more big money than ever
before and need your help so we can stay competitive in our fundraising.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40253?refcode=ema20191027-63988&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=63988%2E444211%2Ea0sDLq ]Will you chip in $3 and help us raise $200,000 before
the end of the month?

Let’s stand strong with Beto,

–Team Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40253?refcode=ema20191027-63988&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=63988%2E444211%2Ea0sDLq ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191027footer&t=1024&refcode2=63988_444211_a0sDLq&akid=63988%2E444211%2Ea0sDLq

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=63988%2E444211%2Ea0sDLq

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Andrew Yang
subject: The American dream is dying and everyone knows it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2207%2E377263%2EUld3g1) Yang Gang --

The reason I’m running for president is because politicians in DC are not up to solving the problems of the 21st century.

Why? Because most of them barely understand the problems of the 21st century.

The numbers say you have a 50-50 chance of doing better than your parents if you are a millennial. That same number was 90% if you were born in the 1940s or 50s.

The American dream is dying -- and everyone knows it. It’s why people are feeling that sinking sense of despair.

We need to wake politicians up from politics as usual and to the problems of this era.

**And it’s going to take a campaign like this one -- outsider, non-politician, completely funded by the people with grassroots donations -- to wake them up.**

[Make a contribution of $10 or more now as a way to show you’re sick of politics as usual. We must hit our goal before midnight Thursday to make this campaign successful. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15281?t=5&akid=2207%2E377263%2EUld3g1)

This is a revolution of humanity and reason. We are tired of the infighting, the nonsense, the solutions that will never touch our lives.

We have to evolve our economy to one that puts humanity first -- real people -- instead of GDP and corporate profits.

I didn’t grow up dreaming of running for president. I’m in this race to help solve problems that are making it harder and harder for us to leave our children more than we had. It’s going to be very, very difficult, but I think we can do it if enough of us get together and do the work.

A year ago, many laughed at this campaign. I can tell you firsthand from the campaign trail -- they are not laughing now.

[Make a contribution of $10 or more now and let’s show everyone our power and our desire for change. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15281?t=7&akid=2207%2E377263%2EUld3g1)

This campaign wasn’t built by big donors or the establishment media -- it was built in spite of those things. And we must remember that it will take an extraordinary effort to take on the other candidates who will have these winds at their backs.

-Andrew Yang | **We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15281?t=6&akid=2207%2E377263%2EUld3g1)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=2207%2E377263%2EUld3g1) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2207%2E377263%2EUld3g1) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: RE: this could be the end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | These could be the last 96 hours of my entire campaign. If I can't raise $800,000 by my End of Month Deadline -- I may have no choice but to exit this race. **[_I 'm counting on your $5 in my make-or-break moment to keep this campaign going and continue the movement we've built together. Will you have my back before midnight? I know we can rise up and meet my End of Month goal in time. >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191027_em_fr_b4_castro_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** For everyone who feels like their voice has been discounted and cast aside. Every child wondering why no President has ever looked like them. Every parent struggling to lift their family out of poverty. **I want you to know: You have a home here with our movement -- you are who I 'm fighting for. ** Right now, I'm asking you to fight for me. Will you rush $5 before midnight to keep me in the race? _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc848/3eb3e2fc/55268f6c/744dadd4/2042352964/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191027_em_fr_b4_castro_all_rs")**
---

subject: Statement on Katie Hill's Resignation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Angela Underwood Jacobs for Congress
body:
Angela Underwood Jacobs, Republican candidate for CA-25, issued a statement on Katie Hill's resignation Sunday night. | | | [ ](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=6865d7816c&e=ec66c3b29a)
---
| |
## **Angela Underwood Jacobs Statement on Katie Hill's Resignation**

(Lancaster, CA) – Angela Underwood Jacobs, Republican candidate for CA-25, issued the following statement on Katie Hill's resignation Sunday night.

"Katie Hill blatantly violated the trust of voters of the 25th District which is why I was the first of her opponents to call on her to resign. I'm a committed wife, mother, trusted community banker and an experienced local elected official. If I'm elected to serve the people of the 25th District in Congress, I will never let them down."
###
---
| [Donate to Angela](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=3588a86b4c&e=ec66c3b29a "Donate to Angela")
---
| [Learn More About Angela](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=06216acb6e&e=ec66c3b29a "Learn More About Angela")
---
| |
---
| |
---
Angela Underwood Jacobs currently serves as the regional Senior Vice President of California Bank and Trust, where she helps Californians live their _American Dream_ – purchase their first home, receive a loan to launch a small business, or save for retirement. Underwood Jacobs was the first African American woman elected to the Lancaster City Council, where she has served since 2015. She is the proud wife of a military veteran and a mother that has lived in Antelope Valley for over 25 years.

To learn more about Angela and her campaign, please visit [www.AngelaForYou.com](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=264507a971&e=ec66c3b29a)

People across Virginia and around the country have been stepping up to help Mark defend Virginia's Senate seat.

**Derek, our records indicate strong numbers from Manassas, but we don't have a record for you on file. Would you make your first donation today to help Mark keep Virginia blue in 2020?**

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm a man of my word
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, On Friday, I told you that if we stay on pace to reach our October goal of raising $725,000 before the end of the month, I'll "reward" everyone with some of my most cringe-worthy Halloween content. Well, I'm a man of my word, and even though we barely scraped by this weekend, I'm thrilled to unveil the best Halloween dad joke you'll hear today. (You can even claim it as your own at Halloween parties.) [**Check it out for yourself -- then please chip in to help us stay on track to meet our goal, and I promise this video won 't be the last.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/halloween-eom?refcode=em_fr_20191028_CB_20191028-fr-CB-halloween2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Getting a little more serious for a second, we all know this race is going to come down to which campaign can inspire the most voters in the next few months. I'm so proud of the team we've built across the country, and I have a lot of confidence that -- if we have the resources we need -- I have a real shot at winning. And we, as Democrats, must win this election. Halloween with Donald Trump in the White House is no scarier than the other 364 days of the year. [**So here I am, asking for your help to keep our campaign from falling behind at this critical moment. Will you make a donation today?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/halloween-eom?refcode=em_fr_20191028_CB_20191028-fr-CB-halloween2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks,
Cory P.S. OK one more. "_What do vegan zombies eat? "_ P.P.S. GRAAAAAAAAAINS! [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/halloween-eom?refcode=em_fr_20191028_CB_20191028-fr-CB-halloween2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ae3/5fca0d19/76efc8d4/291c35f3/3010632405/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ae3/5fca0d19/76efc8d4/291c35f2/3010632405/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ae3/5fca0d19/76efc8d4/291c35f1/3010632405/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ae3/5fca0d19/76efc8d4/291c35f0/3010632405/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ae3/5fca0d19/76efc8d4/291c35ff/3010632405/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ae3/5fca0d19/76efc8d4/291c35f3/3010632405/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

**Subject:** It’s officially over
**From:** Sheriff Joe Arpaio
**Date:** Saturday, October 26, 2019 | [](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=3a49b917e3dc4a149508a3bab2e50c77&_e=EyEwabXKMkQCBMvnQP9oufUDxnE4_GIUcA2X52NImQXWuENcKOhlVqnEr-q_taAbtGRs192dAJN5BxHTx0h4e0auqtQxH2lybkWJFQgHla_5MFyfhpBPk997VhXGwEbWbd6NibtrftmXGvcyPDYNJAX6YAMF6o3wD79rJid270b_esiEF-1je2VZlSQ4J-gWPV-h-20ju1g8MJ4jFrYW9XbNbUjkShjjkdnGl0mss9JmPuq2wi3IMVsS9I7ZSnSg9s0SKtZwkplZXgM0vantVaygMqfxIjN8q0MPialMHd0vAw2gdM0hbEgBE_xdTmHBTIZ2lJjVaOEz8w041AEKYUaT1I_QetabQgpKh4hPdPugOIXYQU0CNvpvyBnHBAlsy1nzlqIYSZ5n1XD70fHIZA%3D%3D)

Friend,

In less than one week my campaign will be facing a make or break moment and honestly, I’m getting nervous I may have to wave the white flag. **[You see, I’m still behind my October fundraising goal and if I don’t raise an additional $35,000 before midnight –](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=3a49b917e3dc4a149508a3bab2e50c77&_e=EyEwabXKMkQCBMvnQP9oufUDxnE4_GIUcA2X52NImQXWuENcKOhlVqnEr-q_taAbtGRs192dAJN5BxHTx0h4e0auqtQxH2lybkWJFQgHla_5MFyfhpBPk997VhXGwEbWbd6NibtrftmXGvcyPDYNJAX6YAMF6o3wD79rJid270b_esiEF-1je2VZlSQ4J-gW9p4r3RQju6t5P5Io27NtfzDERdfaWfYPQ24YDPZeJOUOFJAxUNv55vd8QYAQUqpPS32A5zNcBHOijm1JOzKBiT4Pq5E9pc1NBiouh3cb7_jPLxA8zZQDi-Uef4vrL3nkNU38KzD1mv1aVSFdMTY9jMwItG08D4MMLiSiZXRI2rTABdRSAoOFWDkcVrd5cSlkcUMHM3MZKBAwwuZigRJxfw%3D%3D)** this race is officially over for me.

It takes a lot to rock me, but the stakes this election are too high to play it cool. **[Would you consider supporting my America First campaign by donating $10, $25, $50, $100 or even more before midnight?](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=3a49b917e3dc4a149508a3bab2e50c77&_e=EyEwabXKMkQCBMvnQP9oufUDxnE4_GIUcA2X52NImQXWuENcKOhlVqnEr-q_taAbtGRs192dAJN5BxHTx0h4e0auqtQxH2lybkWJFQgHla_5MFyfhpBPk997VhXGwEbWbd6NibtrftmXGvcyPDYNJAX6YAMF6o3wD79rJid270b_esiEF-1je2VZlSQ4J-gWg6lCGzU2nHUBUVglnChkEJSV1tPc_qo-BLaisyTTIynuprlkppgd7XXSZamtMWk8xHsYIVQ7Lk20rx7XGVH8iKLlGkQSbTGjqEPSHRra8CaJcPpHWPj_Owjq-NP4PgqcJsYoCNovO6wgFey0Y4MSDe_KUXuSWU56_WWb2sYWerPwl-g5fdsfzGHjw7xo_KGx5SFNbPlYmFnnl53lDsHmhQ%3D%3D)**
| [**MIDNIGHT DEADLINE ➩ ➩**](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=3a49b917e3dc4a149508a3bab2e50c77&_e=EyEwabXKMkQCBMvnQP9oufUDxnE4_GIUcA2X52NImQXWuENcKOhlVqnEr-q_taAbtGRs192dAJN5BxHTx0h4e0auqtQxH2lybkWJFQgHla_5MFyfhpBPk997VhXGwEbWbd6NibtrftmXGvcyPDYNJAX6YAMF6o3wD79rJid270b_esiEF-1je2VZlSQ4J-gWhhBoWof3ZJP9VLIP_2osYgj5qKovME59VJ9_9DYt-2S9qD775yr08IO6wHfut_2tkir8qCE8KPrEzd_uAeQab_wt4YJhu0-46ZLmZ3V930SUABP7yCG8Efj6NKwrwRXnZQpTEJbwELO2S_VzksLT0VsplpwIG8AylfBw9Bcgc_8awVw6HNJN2QKdGQLu2T88OtQjtriU3liMUQ8ug2Rhow%3D%3D)

As the Sheriff of Maricopa County for over two decades, I had a front row seat to the dangers facing our communities _each and every day._

While Democrats continue their calls for amnesty, open borders, and sanctuary cities I’m preparing to win this race and get back to work. That means **locking up** violent criminals, human traffickers, and gang members who, oh by the way, **_enter our country illegally._**

Friend, the **status quo** is unacceptable. **[But in order for me to continue my fight against the D.C. Swamp and ending the immigration crisis plaguing our country, I need to hear from you.](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=3a49b917e3dc4a149508a3bab2e50c77&_e=EyEwabXKMkQCBMvnQP9oufUDxnE4_GIUcA2X52NImQXWuENcKOhlVqnEr-q_taAbtGRs192dAJN5BxHTx0h4e0auqtQxH2lybkWJFQgHla_5MFyfhpBPk997VhXGwEbWbd6NibtrftmXGvcyPDYNJAX6YAMF6o3wD79rJid270b_esiEF-1je2VZlSQ4J-gWEvszCvIvOZB4Km-KU8A9vrxOZaDMGjIBCpWB9A_Dgz-cK8qpO-nxCeCeSiNouMJEwnb26R0DsnvNqc7qNz-WnBk5-oRiWHwNVSdJjPr-lauMET7ZUK5872aCHulHLK0oYnnVIOWz46tjCdzWx_UrXsaj7Bv7zdX6hwL7jM8V9MIPtWod84a0OvxIPiD233xIFix-4bvOn3hnKftAJ090Rw%3D%3D)**

I still need to raise $35,000 before midnight. **[Can I count you in?](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=3a49b917e3dc4a149508a3bab2e50c77&_e=EyEwabXKMkQCBMvnQP9oufUDxnE4_GIUcA2X52NImQXWuENcKOhlVqnEr-q_taAbtGRs192dAJN5BxHTx0h4e0auqtQxH2lybkWJFQgHla_5MFyfhpBPk997VhXGwEbWbd6NibtrftmXGvcyPDYNJAX6YAMF6o3wD79rJid270b_esiEF-1je2VZlSQ4J-gW3WYTxgz-bVv6tj6NGIsO86GtPDbgIAx_Ks24r1fIRtpl3Z7b5IZ4TTL_ItzEzo87VfboR04y2MzaB2oMmskH2i2K0Q06hfOpzg0E3azisIifONNt7-0z583gYp5nvLBM5zZQ5EOk9Me_7qjo78e0Mmzi4fHyMINxYYbpXwn3P9uXVAQWytBx4MoSUWLxQZD3yZPyQnzPVA_qlkL_2igWxQ%3D%3D)**

For America,

Sheriff Joe Arpaio

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Peter, you’re the reason we’re in this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

I know you’re busy -- with work, or school, or family -- but I wanted you to know that I’m incredibly grateful that you make time to help our campaign stand tall for Iowans.

You are the heart and soul of this campaign.

You are the reason why I am inspired to get behind the wheel of Sioux City Sue and drive to the small and proud Iowa towns on our “Don’t Forget About Us” tour.

Your support is what drives our campaign forward, and gives us the ability to go everywhere, talk to everyone, and not write anyone off.

If we’re going to beat Steve King, it will take all of us. We need to go everywhere from the big cities to the small towns and talk to as many Iowans as possible -- and that’s why emails like this at the end of the month are so important. Every time folks like you chip in, it helps put gas in the tank and keeps me out there on the campaign trail.

**_[Peter, can I count on you to chip in $5 or more before Thursday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline? We need to hit this month’s grassroots goal. Please chip in what you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11298975/114892977/1796747094?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OThhNzdmYi1hZWY5LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OiXDdwFqYvBmIUnpG8ngYVHzHAdotblzOGWhMr3YEis=&refcode=em19_191028_eom1_l1)_**

That’s important -- no doubt -- but this campaign is also about lifting up the voices of our rural communities and working families who have been forgotten and left behind by politicians.

I’ve had enough of the neglect and the lack of investment that has caused hospitals to consolidate, grocery stores and schools to close, and more of my friends and neighbors to move away seeking opportunities elsewhere.

**_[People are waking up and ready for change. But for us to win and give working people a seat at the table of our democracy again, we need to make this campaign a little stronger each month. clean_body: Peter -- I know you’re busy -- with work, or school, or family -- but I wanted you to know that I’m incredibly grateful that you make time to help our campaign stand tall for Iowans. You are the heart and soul of this campaign. You are the reason why I am inspired to get behind the wheel of Sioux City Sue and drive to the small and proud Iowa towns on our “Don’t Forget About Us” tour. Your support is what drives our campaign forward, and gives us the ability to go everywhere, talk to everyone, and not write anyone off. If we’re going to beat Steve King, it will take all of us. We need to go everywhere from the big cities to the small towns and talk to as many Iowans as possible -- and that’s why emails like this at the end of the month are so important. Every time folks like you chip in, it helps put gas in the tank and keeps me out there on the campaign trail. This campaign is about more than just defeating Steve King and his selfish, hateful agenda. That’s important -- no doubt -- but this campaign is also about lifting up the voices of our rural communities and working families who have been forgotten and left behind by politicians. I’ve had enough of the neglect and the lack of investment that has caused hospitals to consolidate, grocery stores and schools to close, and more of my friends and neighbors to move away seeking opportunities elsewhere. Thank you, J.D. Scholten

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: DEMO MEMO: Alex Mooney Breaches National Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/demo%20memo.jpg]

DEMO MEMO: Last week’s desperate political stunt by Republicans in Congress proved that they can’t defend Donald Trump on the facts.

WVGOP Reps. Alex Mooney and Carol Miller “stormed” the SCIF and put our national security at risk in a shameless attempt to disrupt the impeachment inquiry. Not only did they disrupt the meeting, but Alex Mooney also broke federal law by taking in and using his cell phone .

🔴 The GOP isn't being shut out of this process — the Republican members of the relevant committees or their staff have access to the SCIF for these depositions already, as well as equal time to question witnesses.

🔴 More than a quarter of the Republicans who crashed last week's deposition were actually allowed to attend and ask questions as members of the relevant committees. Instead, they went all-in on a ridiculous political stunt.

🔴 Carol Miller was one of those Republicans. She was supposed to attend as part of the Oversight Committee. Instead, she protested not being able to attend (we’re confused too.)

🔴 Alex Mooney defended his actions. Those actions broke federal law and put our national security at serious risk.

Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.

West Virginia Democratic Party
PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States

body:
| |

---
| |
#
We knew that raising $25,000 in the last week of October was going to be a heavy lift. But it’s crucial we meet this goal because of the far-Left onslaught coming our way.

[**We’re still $17,757 short of our October goal. Can you step up right now to help us close the gap? **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0cfa6fdb82&e=02cd889ad3)

With the Democrat debate coming to Georgia next month and both of our Senate seats on the ballot, a wave of radical liberal dollars and attention from the national media is coming our way.

All of this means we’re in for a tougher fight than ever before. David is ready, but he can’t do this alone. [**Can you chip in right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=6951b3ef3a&e=02cd889ad3)

The choice in 2020 is really simple. Either we build on our results and continue returning to our Founding Principles... or we let radical Democrats take us down the road to socialism.

**Not on David’s watch, but he needs you in the fight.** Georgia will decide who controls the White House and Senate next year. Before the Democrats running for President come to town next month, there’s no better time to pitch in than right now.

[**If we hit this $25,000 goal, we can send a clear message that Georgia is not up for grabs and that our Republican Senate majority is stronger than ever. Please consider giving whatever you can afford.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a56772f3b1&e=02cd889ad3)

Thanks for everything.

Derrick Dickey
Senior Strategist
Perdue for Senate

name: Shannon Salk, Team Hick
subject: Defeating Trump is only half the battle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
2020 is a presidential election year, and the reality is, as Election Day nears and the focus intensifies on who our next president will be, important races like ours can start to take a back seat. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149d/691c9bd/6fe989ff/11a78964/1650773400/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

One year from this moment, we'll be staring down the home stretch of this campaign. I know that sounds like a long time, but hear me out.

2020 is a presidential election year, and the reality is, as Election Day nears and the focus intensifies on who our next president will be, important races like ours can start to take a back seat.

It's an understandable but frustrating reality for Finance Directors on Senate campaigns around the country, and it's why [**_I 'm asking you right now if you can pitch in $26 to help us meet our end-of-month goal._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191028_SS_20191028-fr-SS-EOM3-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

It's no secret that we have an _incredible_ group of presidential candidates this year, with policy proposals that will fundamentally make our country a better place for millions of people.

But defeating Donald Trump is only half the battle. John knows that we have to take back the Senate if we're going to accomplish those goals.

The path to taking the majority back from Mitch McConnell runs right through Colorado, team, and we know he isn't going to let this seat go without a fight. He's already funneling millions of dollars in shady special interest money into this race.

**We can 't fall behind--November 3, 2020 will be here before we know it. Chip in now:** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191028_SS_20191028-fr-SS-EOM3-all_all_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $10 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_20191028_SS_20191028-fr-SS-EOM3-all_all_expresslane10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $26 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=em_fr_20191028_SS_20191028-fr-SS-EOM3-all_all_expresslane25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $50 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20191028_SS_20191028-fr-SS-EOM3-all_all_expresslane50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $100 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20191028_SS_20191028-fr-SS-EOM3-all_all_expresslane100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191028_SS_20191028-fr-SS-EOM3-all_all_expresslaneother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,
Shannon

Finance Director
Hickenlooper for Colorado [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191028_SS_20191028-fr-SS-EOM3-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149d/691c9bd/6fe989ff/11a78e9a/1650773400/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149d/691c9bd/6fe989ff/11a78e9b/1650773400/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149d/691c9bd/6fe989ff/11a78e98/1650773400/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149d/691c9bd/6fe989ff/11a78e99/1650773400/VEsHAQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").

But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149d/691c9bd/6fe989ff/11a78e96/1650773400/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Demand Congress stand up for democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, The new Democratic majority in the House passed H.R. 1 back in March, a landmark election reform bill also known as the For the People Act. This bill will close campaign finance loopholes, encourage universal voter registration, and strengthen the enforcement of election laws to prevent foreign interference like we saw in 2016. But Mitch McConnell and the GOP have declared this bill a Democratic power grab because they know that if everyone could vote, Republicans would lose. Supporting free and fair elections and encouraging voter participation should be a bipartisan goal; yet, Mitch McConnel has decided to kill H.R. 1 by preventing the Senate from voting on it \-- just like he is trying to prevent millions of voters from participating in the 2020 elections. [**If you support expanding voting rights, eliminating foreign meddling, and eliminating the power of dark money in our elections, we need you to stand with us today. Add your name to ours to urge Mitch to stop standing in the way of democracy and bring this bill to a vote on the floor of the Senate!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc57/6e9863e8/15c09c56/1db08940/1387878529/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/forthepeopleact/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing up for democracy, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc57/6e9863e8/15c09c56/1db08940/1387878529/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/forthepeopleact/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

He still needs 2,093 Democrats to step up before the deadline to WIN and defeat McConnell's Senate. >>_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191028_em_fr_b1_begala_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** I've been in the game for a while. I know moments like this don't come around very often. And I know in my bones that if Democrats don't seize this moment, we'll be left waiting even LONGER for another shot at ousting Mitch. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump Announces Death of ISIS Leader in US Raid
body:
“Last night, the United States brought the world’s Number One terrorist leader to justice,” President Donald J. Trump said. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2c8854c6ad&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump Announces Death of ISIS Leader in US Raid**

“Last night, the United States brought the world’s Number One terrorist leader to justice,” President Donald J. Trump said yesterday from the East Room of the White House.

“Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi is dead.”

The terrorist leader’s “death represents a significant symbolic victory in the battle against the terror group and marks the end of a years-long effort to track down the elusive ISIS leader, who had been reported killed multiple times in the past,” Morgan Chalfant reports for _The Hill_. “Trump declared that al-Baghdadi’s death demonstrated the United States's ‘relentless pursuit of terrorist leaders and our commitment to the enduring and total defeat of ISIS and other terrorist organizations.’”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=50ae51997d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| On Sunday, the parents of Kayla Mueller, who was taken hostage by al-Baghdadi in 2013 and killed 18 months later, praised President Trump and the soldiers who completed this mission, Karina Bland writes in _[The Arizona Republic](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e389423b78&e=3ee4985eea)_. “I still say Kayla should be here, and if Obama had been as decisive as President Trump, maybe she would have been," Marsha Mueller said.
---
|
---
| “On Sunday morning, The Washington Post seemingly struggled to come up with a headline for Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi’s obituary,” Ashe Schow writes in _[The Daily Wire](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4daa9aef7e&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Just imagine the Post claiming Osama bin Laden was an ‘austere religious scholar.’ You can’t, because that’s not how the Post described him after the raid that killed him during the Obama Administration ... Yet when the leader of a terrorist organization dies under President Donald Trump, the word ‘terrorist’ gets removed.”
---
|
---
| “A week after he was inaugurated, Trump issued National Security Presidential Memorandum 3, which mandated an updated campaign plan against ISIS within 30 days,” Peter Bergen writes for [CNN](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7caa14bd4a&e=3ee4985eea). The President deserves credit for giving “his military commanders the authority for taking action against ISIS so they were no longer micromanaged by the White House, as was often the case under Obama.”
---
|
---
| “The S&P 500 hit a record high on Monday, breaking above an all-time high set over the summer as investors cheered strong earnings and progress on U.S.-China trade,” Fred Imbert reports for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06b7e79421&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f448124a8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a3b472d0cc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=22715971cb)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

The President deserves credit for giving “his military commanders the authority for taking action against ISIS so they were no longer micromanaged by the White House, as was often the case under Obama.” | | “The S&P 500 hit a record high on Monday, breaking above an all-time high set over the summer as investors cheered strong earnings and progress on U.S.-China trade,” Fred Imbert reports for . | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

There's only one way we're raising money for this campaign.

I'm not holding any fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check -- because a person's wealth shouldn't determine the amount of time they can spend with me -- or any presidential candidate.

I'm not counting on a billionaire to fund a Super PAC for me -- because the Democratic primary can't just be one more plaything for the rich and powerful.

I'm not taking a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests.

**Instead, we're building a true grassroots campaign with grassroots donors -- because that's the only way we'll create a movement strong enough to make big, structural change in our economy, our government, and our democracy.**

**[I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important: Will you make a donation before Thursday's fundraising deadline to continue to build our movement? $3 or whatever you can chip in would make a huge difference. >
On a typical presidential campaign, this close to a fundraising deadline, my team would be flying me from big city to big city to scoop up as many big fat checks as possible.

Wealthy donors might come see me at fancy receptions in hedge fund offices. They'd sip champagne, nibble on shrimp cocktail, and try to convince me that the tax loophole that just so happens to pad their pockets is also good for the whole country.

But I'm not running to be a president who only pays attention to the wealthy and well-connected.

I'm running to be everybody's president. My time is not for sale, and every supporter has an equal place in our movement.

Instead of getting cozy with the rich and powerful, I'm on the road this week for meet-and-greets and organizing events. Anyone's welcome to come -- no big check required.

If you ask me, that's what a campaign for president should be all about. Talking with everyday Americans, in their hometowns, about real solutions to real problems. Getting organized at the grassroots level to make change happen. Having conversations with school-teachers, bus operators, McDonald's workers (hello, Logan in Idaho!), and anyone who gives a little at a time.

But this type of campaign is only possible if everyone who is able pitches in what they can.

I'm running to be the best president that money can't buy, but I can't do it alone. This is how we'll stop Washington from just answering to the beck and call of billionaires and giant corporations -- one grassroots donation at a time.

Without the backing of wealthy donors, I truly need your help to make sure the ideas we care about continue to be part of the national conversation.

**[Please chip in before Thursday's fundraising deadline to help grow our campaign. Let's build something incredible together.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528322/45c30650/100e33c4b/66f229c7/3743765021/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSzFRRl9FT01fQklPX0VfMjAxOTEwMjhfVjJTM19QX1QzIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK1QF_EOM_BIO_E_20191028_V2S3_P_T3")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Jay Inslee
subject: I'm pretty scared right now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We have to fight back.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7283?t=3&akid=7976%2E868730%2EorSTWy) Friend, Halloween is fast approaching, but it was last week's news that _really_ scared me. Because of relentless attacks -- and millions of dollars spent -- by the Republican Governors Association, Louisiana Governor and fellow Democrat John Bel Edwards fell short of the majority vote he needed to win reelection outright. That race is now headed to a runoff next month, thanks to the RGA's massive investment in the race. If you think Louisiana is the end, think again. **There are just three Democratic incumbents the RGA can target in 2020 -- I'm one of them.** Since 2018, they've raised almost $200 million, and they're itching to spend it against me, you can bet on that. Grassroots donations from folks like you would go a long way right now in preparing for what's to come. **[We have a $25,000 goal to hit before Thursday's public end-of-month deadline -- will you donate $1 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7283?t=4&akid=7976%2E868730%2EorSTWy)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7284?t=5&akid=7976%2E868730%2EorSTWy)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7285?t=6&akid=7976%2E868730%2EorSTWy)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7286?t=7&akid=7976%2E868730%2EorSTWy)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7287?t=8&akid=7976%2E868730%2EorSTWy)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7288?t=9&akid=7976%2E868730%2EorSTWy)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7289?t=10&akid=7976%2E868730%2EorSTWy)
---
A few weeks ago, Governor Edwards' reelection seemed almost written in stone. He's wildly popular in Louisiana -- but then the GOP turned up the heat -- and their relentless ads, deep pockets, and half-truths could mean a Republican governor in Louisiana.
That's why I say over and over: _Don't believe anyone who tells you this race is certain._
We should have learned after 2016 that nothing is certain. Make no mistake: While we're working to bring real progress to Washington state, Republicans are plotting. They have a plan to unseat me next year, and they could put that plan into motion at any moment. We have to be prepared -- that's why I'm asking you right now:
**[Will you donate $1 or more to help me fight back against Republican attacks, and keep fighting for progress as Washington's governor? We have a huge deadline coming up on Thursday, and your support really does make a world of difference.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7283?t=11&akid=7976%2E868730%2EorSTWy)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7283?t=12&akid=7976%2E868730%2EorSTWy)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=7976%2E868730%2EorSTWy). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---
All content (C) 2019 JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D), All Rights Reserved

name: Tina Smith
subject: Tell Congress to stop robocalls >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We all have received these robocalls, but now it's time for Congress to get legislation across the finish line. Add your name to stop the scam calls >>

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191025robocalls2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team -

How many robocalls have you received this week?

These calls are more than just a nuisance, they're the start of being involved with a scam. They are harmful, and there's no question: We need to be doing more to stop these calls.

Both the Senate and the House have passed bills to crack down on these harassing calls, and now we need to get legislation enacted into law to shed light on who these callers are, and hold them accountable for their actions.

**I want these calls to stop as much as you do, and I need your help to make that happen.**

**[Friend, I'm counting on you to be one of the voices we need urging Congress to crack down on robocalls. Add your name right now>>](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41959/c1f7015/672a6fb6/11451e8b/105314271/VEsE/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stop-scam-robocalls/smith?refcode=em191025robocalls2-full&&")** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41959/c1f7015/672a6fb6/11451e8c/105314271/VEsF/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stop-scam-robocalls/smith?refcode=em191025robocalls2-full&")** **We can make scammers think twice before making a dial. But we need to make sure that legislation is enacted into law.**

**[It's time to take action against fraudulent callers. Will you join me in calling for Congress to get legislation done?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41959/c1f7015/672a6fb6/11451e8c/105314271/VEsC/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stop-scam-robocalls/smith?refcode=em191025robocalls2-full&")**

Thanks for your help,

Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191028robocalls2-nonop-biobox&amount=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: Mike Franken
subject: The stakes in this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
When the stakes are this high, it's more important than ever to lead with your values and your principles. And that's exactly why I'm in this race.
|
---

| | Friends-- I'm in this race because I believe in America's 'small-d' democratic process and I believe that we have leaders who are letting our democracy degrade. **I 'm in this race because I believe we can turn things around.** I spent over 36 years in the Navy. As I advanced through the ranks, I learned how to spot a problem, develop a thoughtful strategy to improve it, and then execute that strategy. Whether at sea or posted ashore, I became adept at developing thoughtful strategies to fix what's broken, improve what's suboptimal, and perfect where feasible. Our strategy for this campaign has been three-fold:
* Lead with Iowa principles and values. Don't compromise.
* Speak the truth, no matter the polls.
* Listen to voters in every part of Iowa, from all walks of life.

**People are noticing our strategy - and it 's working.** We can right this ship. **But our strategy doesn 't work without you. [Can you chip in right now before our end of month deadline?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247c/33365068/4a65a526/3f8bba66/2917961025/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191028_fr_em")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $10 now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247c/33365068/4a65a526/3f8bba67/2917961025/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20191028_fr_em_express_lane_10")
---

---
[Donate $50 now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247c/33365068/4a65a526/3f8bba61/2917961025/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20191028_fr_em_express_lane_50")

Mike Franken

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: "Democrats now have a real chance at winning the Senate" - CNN
body:
The math works.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc3/4bef7a87/6b3b1622/287fd947/497907113/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**CNN: ****"Democrats now have a real chance at winning the Senate in 2020"**
[**Chip in to defeat Susan Collins and flip the Senate >>>**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc3/4bef7a87/6b3b1622/287fd946/497907113/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191028-full")
Friends,
If Democrats are going to take back the Senate, we have to win in Maine. Period.
The good news is, we know we can do it! Fifty percent of Mainers disapprove of Collins' job performance, and a recent poll shows a Democrat beating Collins by _three points!_
The math works for us - but that doesn't mean Sara is going to walk into this Senate seat. Defeating Susan Collins and her special interest backers will be _incredibly_ difficult.
**That 's why we're starting the hard work now, and it's why we can't afford to fall short of our October fundraising goal. Can we count on your support?**
[**Make a $3 contribution before October comes to a close this Thursday at midnight. We 're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so your donation will go a very long way towards helping us win. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc3/4bef7a87/6b3b1622/287fd946/497907113/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191028-full")
Thanks for your support. When Sara wins this race, it will be because people like you believed in us from the very beginning.
All our best,
_Team Sara_
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc3/4bef7a87/6b3b1622/287fd946/497907113/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191028-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc3/4bef7a87/6b3b1622/287fd945/497907113/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc3/4bef7a87/6b3b1622/287fd944/497907113/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: A long email about why I'm running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36390abe/55b66746/2c1b4ad6/80ccbbc/986679394/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| |

Three days into this campaign, I visited the South End in Boston. At the intersection of Massachusetts Avenue and Melnea Cass Boulevard, a public health crisis has gripped the city, a devastating mix of homelessness, addiction and poverty.

**A woman came up to me as our group approached a local homeless shelter, and she was screaming. Sobbing._I'm doing everything I can, _she said. _But here I am on the street, with nothing. What else do you want from me? What else can I do?_** This, in a state with 98% health care coverage.

A few weeks before I'd been at a hospital in Attleboro, walking through an ER so full you couldn't fit down the hallways. They were packed with mental health patients waiting to be seen, to be treated, to find a bed in a facility somewhere in the state that could care for them. An eight-year-old boy who had been there for five full days. An 83-year-old man who had been there even longer. _It shouldn't be this hard to help them_ , an exhausted doctor told me. Then there was **the church in Worcester **filled with LGBTQ refugees, struggling to find their place in a country that had promised them acceptance but delivered them exclusion. The **veterans in Somerville **fighting to access basic needs after giving everything to protect our freedom. The **advocates and officials in Greenfield **working day and night to wrap their arms around an opioid crisis that has left no community unscathed. The **immigrant families at St. Luke's **in Chelsea, the **men and women at Our Father's Table **in Fitchburg, the **children at Duffy Health Center on the Cape** -- all of them forced to fight for the basic dignity our nation is supposed to promise all.

**I want to be crystal clear with you: this is why I'm running for Senate.** Because across the Commonwealth our people are being locked out, let down and left behind. Because injustice and oppression still grow in American soil. And because our system - our politics AND our policies - has wholly failed to respond.
**So I can't hear the stories I've heard, met the people I've met, and be content to wait. To accept the status quo. To decide that our people are getting the leadership they deserve.**

Because they're not. We've left the families who need us most high and dry. Forced to fend for themselves in a country that has made it difficult to be middle-class, excruciating to be poor, and downright impossible to be poor AND. Poor and black. Poor and brown. Poor and female. Poor and gay. Poor and sick or old or addicted.

In Congress, these have been my fights. For the low-wage workers exploited in an economy that takes them for granted. For the transgender Americans denied basic human dignity because of who they are. For the folks suffering from mental illness -- and the families that love them--forced to the margins of the richest health care system on Earth. For the working families fighting eviction or discrimination, thrown into a justice system that does not offer them a chance in hell.

**My campaign is a movement to bring back in the people who have been cut out and amplify the voices that have been ignored. **We want every hand in this Commonwealth on deck: new faces, new energy, new perspectives, new activism, new ideas and a new approach.

The more people willing to get in the fight, the better. That's what this campaign is about.

**Grateful to have you on the team.**

_Joe_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36390abe/55b66746/2c1b4ad6/80ccbbd/986679394/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-10-28-running&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36390abe/55b66746/2c1b4ad6/80ccbbe/986679394/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-10-28-running&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36390abe/55b66746/2c1b4ad6/80ccbbf/986679394/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-10-28-running&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36390abe/55b66746/2c1b4ad6/80ccbb8/986679394/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-10-28-running&refcode2=express-buttons")
---|---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---

PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36390abe/55b66746/2c1b4ad6/80ccbba/986679394/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, [click here to get off all our lists instantly.](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36390abe/55b66746/2c1b4ad6/80ccbbb/986679394/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36390abe/55b66746/2c1b4ad6/80ccbc4/986679394/VEsP/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/contact/"). |

name: Brandon Fricke
subject: Help California fire victims
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fricke for Congress
body:
Our neighbors here in the 33rd District, our brave firefighters, and our fellow Californians across the state all need our help and support in the midst of these latest disasters. | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53288321:s2TO_OwNf:m:1:2185358397:28822B68BDBF4351E16298002030BA6E:r)
---
Friend,

As you know, California is once again being devastated by wildfires, which have even reached our very own 33rd Congressional District.

These heartbreaking disasters affect all of us, regardless of party affiliation, economic status, or even geography.

Hundreds of thousands of our fellow Californians have had to evacuate, many have lost their homes, and tragically a few have even lost their lives. Our firefighters and first responders are doing everything they can to stop these blazes, spare homes, and save lives.

**They ALL need our help.** So today, instead of asking you to donate to my campaign, I'm asking you to give to the **American Red Cross** to provide relief for victims and to the **California Fire Foundation** to support our first responders.

[ **Help victims ››**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53288322:s2TO_OwNf:m:1:2185358397:28822B68BDBF4351E16298002030BA6E:r)
[ **Support firefighters ››**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53288323:s2TO_OwNf:m:1:2185358397:28822B68BDBF4351E16298002030BA6E:r)
Our neighbors here in the 33rd District, our brave firefighters, and our fellow Californians across the state all need our help and support in the midst of these latest disasters.

Please send whatever support you can give - even just $5 to either of these non-profits will make a difference.

God bless,

Brandon Fricke
Candidate for Congress

| Paid for by Fricke for Congress
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system September 9, 2019.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is2TO_OwNf). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os2TO_OwNf)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Another witness fails to appear before Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Democrats continue to bravely forge ahead with the impeachment inquiry of Trump, with shocking revelation after shocking revelation surfacing with each new witness. But Trump administration officials have repeatedly refused to show up and testify, even under congressional subpoena. Former Trump national security advisor John Bolton's deputy, Charles Kupperman, was supposed to be testifying before House investigators right now, but instead, he skipped and asked a judge whether or not he was required to show up. Trump has been resistant at every turn, and has accused Rep. Adam Schiff, Democratic chair of the House Intelligence Committee, of committing a "criminal act" in challenging Trump and leading this investigation. Trump is doing everything in his power to threaten and obstruct the impeachment inquiry, so we NEED to know where the average Democratic voter stands: **Do you support the House impeachment inquiry?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc59/6e9863e8/15c22cee/1db089e9/67914537/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/LlY8i1E6") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc59/6e9863e8/15c22cee/1db089e9/67914537/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/LlY8i1E6") Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc59/6e9863e8/15c22cee/1db089e8/67914537/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191028b.ND-b&refcode2=ISGkECalHF6bUhHIcHD4")
---

Washington, DC 20003

name: Steve Daines
subject: Do-Nothing Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
We need to fight back. We won't take a back seat to the Democrats as they attempt to destroy President Trump and overturn the will of the American people. That's why I joined Lindsey Graham today in condemning the "closed-door, illegitimate impeachment inquiry" lead by Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_s=d4e00626db4441a8aa5109962cef30d1&_t=aLIIC-XsduEXVwPUK3PuuSMUc-RfgBRFgjh1ObjBssSd6U61FNa44-uS717KhIGi8-HxhPFgw3-l3cUBhTwy4cSYOUw9dfYS_Lt-3-88jWLKmLmecMJxLSz6VtvwndnZxPDo454NrkDoVobgynLLBz85gqZQGY9H6V7dcssb-_U%3D) | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=d4e00626db4441a8aa5109962cef30d1&_e=3OEDriHi2EBj9brpldM8U8PwJwH7mxhwP0uxkHuoxFZ3v0CpPTrZAPM8GQBMxFVCQ5R5Q-ZdATqUeaSIMuuhKSOwDfICSZpgNGVaWAK1xK9IWlxQ87HzehKwTfx2hbcC2355EqNouoRHzFnhflaeuiW9zUmqFsuk8Pp9rixrKzVmr5WF-X-1MIEmBiUa3B0Hj6ng4ntI-FCZFXyK0b84NpQo_NgdoCfmwavPjfLBvKFnkXC4VF2F3D1YS1n1NIsBghVuPZzc8S3NHlDaqcpwhDiEW8Ok4iWBd-W47_A4iNNIscb4L44hGrzy2VZBkwHglCkj3F3Rb91hHXw2VjAp1Z7tPJIuYFm-hjmRIWYBKGk%3D)
---
Friend,

What's happening back in Washington is a travesty.

Over the weekend, we saw President Trump's decisive leadership first-hand when our military launched a daring raid that resulted in the death of ISIS terrorist leader, al-Baghdadi.

It was an incredible moment for our country. _But, what did we see from the Democrats?_ They could barely bring themselves to express their appreciation to the President and our military.
[](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=d4e00626db4441a8aa5109962cef30d1&_e=3OEDriHi2EBj9brpldM8U8PwJwH7mxhwP0uxkHuoxFZ3v0CpPTrZAPM8GQBMxFVCQ5R5Q-ZdATqUeaSIMuuhKSOwDfICSZpgNGVaWAK1xK9IWlxQ87HzehKwTfx2hbcC2355EqNouoRHzFnhflaeukr2eoohObYORSmmJaQTisDyARZVjGSjxY-QpZ6kI8CWLdApdEAdaTmC1y7gEzyBLoTCtSBnN1p66QEWp1xtqu0PvDhx07L4loztuL5ikE42cUeKYubr8AMCgvx5f5UPkI0uPh0dMfxcSSuxh724OA-tK4p0hgLDBJiG3f6upcgnOHjRjYYqbAamhaRKMuBO3m_c5ckkChRnfEW08tmPaB0%3D)
They continue to remain focused on removing President Trump from office – by whatever means possible. It's impeachment obsession.

Friend, that's why we must take a stand today. It's time to show the do-nothing Democrats that we stand with President Trump. **[Will you add your name to tell Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and the radical Left that you oppose impeachment?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=d4e00626db4441a8aa5109962cef30d1&_e=3OEDriHi2EBj9brpldM8U8PwJwH7mxhwP0uxkHuoxFZ3v0CpPTrZAPM8GQBMxFVCQ5R5Q-ZdATqUeaSIMuuhKSOwDfICSZpgNGVaWAK1xK9IWlxQ87HzehKwTfx2hbcC2355EqNouoRHzFnhflaeun5Dy08tdOR3lg5bg-wv2mnZOKGF29zDYiWgNbxRnxJTHSrIlRWyCYicBdsLs9K2475ex6RDXVnvlcZhrFlynGfSyx-Iv_5D3pDvZo02hePWL0iS8KVZrfJcG67EsOflAYi8nRqyySFHWP4FpvM3Aym-4f6BmaKGdT9EtDLDQ7BjxCjy_RHUNZSjMKFVs1EauOAy4NBSFndEVdWlzuSgc2g%3D)**

Democrats aren't interested in putting America First. They are only interested in overturning the will of the people and taking down President Trump. While we remain focused on supporting our military, fighting to lower prescription drugs, securing fair trade deals and creating more jobs, Democrats can only bring themselves to continue this impeachment obsession.

It's a sham. It's a witch hunt. It's a closed-door, rigged process – and we can't let this stand!

**[Friend, if you agree, please let me hear from you. Add your name today to show that you oppose this SHAM impeachment.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=d4e00626db4441a8aa5109962cef30d1&_e=3OEDriHi2EBj9brpldM8U8PwJwH7mxhwP0uxkHuoxFZ3v0CpPTrZAPM8GQBMxFVCQ5R5Q-ZdATqUeaSIMuuhKSOwDfICSZpgNGVaWAK1xK9IWlxQ87HzehKwTfx2hbcC2355EqNouoRHzFnhflaeupKoWDD0O-fSgtZI8-qoa8vlW1CdT8riL0EdDlOy5LALpiWhFsVQL7bEpXunS005LIasoEQCteCnrjKGKcayIDTCkuq8ZzkKZvfxRGig-XmnBmydiqlHOLgUA8WgGZjQ83F9rXYDLYfPNDzN0lmXXFN9yMCW7dF61cVBABWGRucS8-LGJmDxmMpR08_1A0ykDBofWRvBjUhVs2I3TNzZ8YE%3D)**

We can't let the Democrats take down President Trump. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. **[Add your name today!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=d4e00626db4441a8aa5109962cef30d1&_e=3OEDriHi2EBj9brpldM8U8PwJwH7mxhwP0uxkHuoxFZ3v0CpPTrZAPM8GQBMxFVCQ5R5Q-ZdATqUeaSIMuuhKSOwDfICSZpgNGVaWAK1xK9IWlxQ87HzehKwTfx2hbcC2355EqNouoRHzFnhflaeuhaIERGFsCswCNLruFUkKiVwOpit_SnNPgkaYp0dF5e_PTfPiwss_Nv1SPRxup0ZgH4w6tAeqGi82lnT4ZyZTlJYuyrAbWJ76PL53WXIdFSM6ZV87kUZCZkEwrS_LHzXO2DO9MGcL0TWALuj707XD5HjnKb7-7jpaEOzCfibrFuXZHClCP4MVujW6SBxMMXQsfusxfdepLNXtU71DxI-JjU%3D)**

Thanks,

Senator Steve Daines

P.S. Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff and "the Squad" are impeachment obsessed. They won't get anything done as long as they continue this witch hunt impeachment inquiry against President Trump. **[Show that you stand with President Trump by adding your name to oppose this sham impeachment. clean_body: We need to fight back. We won't take a back seat to the Democrats as they attempt to destroy President Trump and overturn the will of the American people. That's why I joined Lindsey Graham today in condemning the "closed-door, illegitimate impeachment inquiry" lead by Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats. Don't want to receive our emails? | Friend, What's happening back in Washington is a travesty. Over the weekend, we saw President Trump's decisive leadership first-hand when our military launched a daring raid that resulted in the death of ISIS terrorist leader, al-Baghdadi. It was an incredible moment for our country. But, what did we see from the Democrats? They could barely bring themselves to express their appreciation to the President and our military. They continue to remain focused on removing President Trump from office – by whatever means possible. It's impeachment obsession. Friend, that's why we must take a stand today. It's time to show the do-nothing Democrats that we stand with President Trump. Democrats aren't interested in putting America First. They are only interested in overturning the will of the people and taking down President Trump. While we remain focused on supporting our military, fighting to lower prescription drugs, securing fair trade deals and creating more jobs, Democrats can only bring themselves to continue this impeachment obsession. It's a sham. It's a witch hunt. It's a closed-door, rigged process – and we can't let this stand! We can't let the Democrats take down President Trump. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. Thanks, Senator Steve Daines P.S. Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff and "the Squad" are impeachment obsessed. They won't get anything done as long as they continue this witch hunt impeachment inquiry against President Trump. | Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Sam
subject: Not a good night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
I hope you had a chance to catch the most recent debate. Let's just say, Matt Bevin didn't have a good night. Here's a sampling of how reporters described the debate:
|
---

| | Peter,

I hope you had a chance to catch the most recent debate. Let's just say, Matt Bevin didn't have a good night. Here's a sampling of how reporters described the debate: | **"...horrible moments for the governor. Period." **
---
**" Bevin just stumbled" **
**" Andy Beshear ...is winning this debate..." **
But that's not all. Bevin's performance was so bad that he blew off his scheduled media interviews after the debate and scrambled to his car and left.

If it wasn't clear before, it is now. Andy Beshear has the momentum with just eight days left. But Bevin's powerful allies aren't going to go down easy. **Andy 's doing everything he can, but we need your help to put up a fight against the flood of last-minute spending by Bevin and his special interest cronies. We have to be ready. Please chip in right now.**

body:
