clean_body: I’m done with these baseless attacks against our President. Nancy Pelosi and her House Democrats are trying to impeach an innocent man without trans Friend, I’m done with these baseless attacks against our President. Nancy Pelosi and her House Democrats are trying to impeach an innocent man without transparency or due process. President Trump has risked his reputation for the sake of making America great again. As October comes to a close, my team and I discussed what our END OF MONTH FUND should go toward. We all agreed on one point - the fund needs to help our President. ** If you haven’t given yet, now is your chance! Your gift’s value will be tripled immediately and go to defend our President from impeachment. If you have already given this month, give once more to make an even bigger impact on the impeachment process. Your tripled gift can really put a dent in Nancy Pelosi’s plans! Our President is relying on you, friend. The fate of our nation rests in your donation.** John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc.

name: Caitlin, TULSI2020
subject: united
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11307395/114978268/1624370312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E2NmE2Zi1kY2Y5LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LHjQsAEwxPtMSPIx2hh8Tf8BSJbz7AeqL-Ko6O8GvI=&emci=08796268-dcf9-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=fca66a6f-dcf9-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311)
---
| Friend — **I hope you give me a moment to explain exactly why this video speaks to the heart of what makes Tulsi — and our growing movement of Americans — different from every other candidate and campaign:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11307396/114978269/-241962577?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E2NmE2Zi1kY2Y5LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LHjQsAEwxPtMSPIx2hh8Tf8BSJbz7AeqL-Ko6O8GvI=&refcode=em191028_video&refcode2=fca66a6f-dcf9-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) In every town, city and county across the country we are hearing the same thing: Things have changed, and not for the better. One young man in Iowa from the small town of Albia shared that in his town, people can’t even look each other in the eyes at the corner store. He said people have lost friends and even their businesses because of political differences. Conversations that were once casual and friendly have become tense and strained. People are feeling hopeless. Left behind. Bitter with not just the state of politics, but the impact that it’s had on their closest relationships. I really want you to hear this, friend: It doesn’t need to be this way. In our movement, we not only respect, but deeply appreciate, that our great nation is made up of a rich diversity of views and attitudes. That progress cannot be made when we fear differences of opinion, resort to cancel culture, or when we allow our leaders and the media to fan the flames of division. On the campaign trail, Tulsi has the opportunity to meet people from across the political spectrum, from all walks of life and with all different (and often very strongly held) points of view. We do our best to ensure that at our gatherings, we create an environment of aloha and respect that is so lacking from our political discourse. **We may respectfully disagree, yet we are still able to look each other in the eyes and have a conversation. ** **[Short soundbites might work for the DNC debate stage and for corporate media headlines but they don’t work for we, the American people. Are you ready to usher in a new era of unity that works to find common ground and celebrates what makes us great instead of what makes us different? Watch this video and then contribute to our campaign that is capable of not only beating Trump, but unifying our country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11307397/114978270/-241962577?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E2NmE2Zi1kY2Y5LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LHjQsAEwxPtMSPIx2hh8Tf8BSJbz7AeqL-Ko6O8GvI=&refcode=em191028_ask1&refcode2=fca66a6f-dcf9-e911-828b-2818784d6d68)** We have so much more in common, as Americans, than we are ever led to believe if we just read the headlines or listen to our political leaders. But they’re selling a lie, and it’s a lie that Tulsi will continue to call out — in the media, on the campaign trail — in order to heal our great divide. The truth is, I rarely meet people on the trail who just define themselves as merely “pro” or “anti” any complicated or personal issue. Whether it’s on immigration, foreign policy, gun safety, or healthcare, the solution is almost always more nuanced and human than the corporate media or political establishment allows. Our President, our leaders in Congress, our representatives in the media — they have failed us by putting bias and political point scoring ahead of our people, and our planet. As your President, Tulsi will once again make the White House a beacon of hope and light that serves the people, not any particular political party. She will bring a soldier’s values of service above self to the position of commander in chief, honoring the sacrifices of her brothers and sisters in arms who put on the uniform to defend the freedoms, rights and liberties of ALL Americans. [Are you with Tulsi?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11307398/114978271/-241962577?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E2NmE2Zi1kY2Y5LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LHjQsAEwxPtMSPIx2hh8Tf8BSJbz7AeqL-Ko6O8GvI=&refcode=em191028_prebutton&refcode2=fca66a6f-dcf9-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) [WATCH VIDEO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11307399/114978272/-241962577?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E2NmE2Zi1kY2Y5LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LHjQsAEwxPtMSPIx2hh8Tf8BSJbz7AeqL-Ko6O8GvI=&refcode=em191028_button&refcode2=fca66a6f-dcf9-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) Thank you for standing with me, and standing for a better and more united America. For the people —
Caitlin [View this message in your browser to share](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11307400/114978273/-1560031163?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E2NmE2Zi1kY2Y5LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LHjQsAEwxPtMSPIx2hh8Tf8BSJbz7AeqL-Ko6O8GvI=&emci=08796268-dcf9-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=fca66a6f-dcf9-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&sourceid=1014165&ms=em191028&utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em191028)
---

Should you want to unsubscribe—and we would hate to see you leave—[go here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/08796268-dcf9-e911-828b-2818784d6d68/fca66a6f-dcf9-e911-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E2NmE2Zi1kY2Y5LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LHjQsAEwxPtMSPIx2hh8Tf8BSJbz7AeqL-Ko6O8GvI=&id=101199451&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). We have to raise $200,000 for our end-of-month fundraising goal to
remain competitive in this race.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40296?refcode=ema20191028-64136&t=1001&akid=64136%2E444211%2Eu3belY ]We can do this, but it has to be a group effort: If 3 more people
from 34223 chip in even just $2 it would be a huge help.

We can’t emphasize enough how much of an impact it would have [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40296?refcode=ema20191028-64136&t=1003&akid=64136%2E444211%2Eu3belY ]if just 3
more supporters from 34223 contributed even just $2 to our
campaign.

* We’re sprinting to raise another $200,000 before the end of the month.
* Hitting this goal will make a big difference on whether we’ll have the
resources to keep funding certain programs in our budget.
* Our chances will get a whole lot slimmer if we have to slash funds
from our organizing teams, media advertising, or strategy to qualify
Beto for the November Debate.

So when we say that running in this race is a group effort – we really
mean it.

Because Beto doesn’t rely on a handful of wealthy donors or a super PAC to
fund this campaign, we’re relying on everyone in our grassroots movement
to help out. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40718?refcode=ema20191028-64136&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=64136%2E444211%2Eu3belY ]We hope you step up and chip in $2 or anything you can from 34223

Beto has made it clear that this race is about getting everyone involved.

We hope that today 34223 joins us in chipping in and making
sure our campaign has the resources we need to keep fighting.

– Team Beto

| **It’s “Halloween Night” on Dancing with the Stars! **
---
| | We’re doing a fun, spooky jive tonight and dancing second to last. After all of the individual dances there are team dances and I’m on “Team Treat” — I hope you like it!
As we get further in this competition, the more I’m counting on your votes to stay in it. Please consider setting a calendar reminder and encouraging two of your friends to vote too. We need all the votes we can get. Thank you!
---
| | **_How to vote:_**
You can submit 20 votes total for Sean and Lindsay. Please make sure to cast all 20. You can submit 10 votes by texting SEAN to 21523. Each text is one vote, you have to send SEAN 10 times to submit all 10 votes.
You can submit 10 additional votes online at [ABC.com](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ee59b0e9e5&e=f6564bbe3b). You need to start by making an account [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6d88a303c2&e=f6564bbe3b) (which you can do now before voting opens).
When voting begins you login and can add 10 votes for Sean and Lindsay, #TeamSweetandSpicey.
Only votes cast during the live show so consider setting a calendar reminder for 8pm ET. For those in Mountain or Pacific time zones you can still vote but it has to happen while the show is live on the east coast (6-8pm CT and 5-7pm PT). All the information on making an ABC account and other FAQs are [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=77a306fcd7&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
| Follow along for behind the scenes content and live updates on my Instagram, @seanmspicer.

Thanks,

_Sean_

name: Peter Khalil
subject: #LGBTQ+
body:
| | | | We must fight for equality!
---
---
**—**
Drag Queen Story Hour has been a welcome, but inexplicably controversial, addition to the children's story hour lineups at the Fort Vancouver Regional Library.
Yesterday, I attended the last - at least for the foreseeable future - Drag Queen Story Hour. The room was packed to the gills. The staff made sure that the children and parents were insulated from the hatred on display just 50 feet away. Some folks in our community, who should know better, were trotting out the old trope that equates the LGBTQ+ identity with pedophilia. This was, in a word, disgusting.
You can hear my full response [here](https://u10586488.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=W9Smq9u-2FGdEKDZ-2FVYToYNwROaIMb-2B7rrPXqqCPKzbbEX-2FQZChUF775YtHjdSwwy4NwR3mKjkweGE9Tithd-2Fq-2BA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCERHvyJx0KbFNmY2J7ZEKFKefcffNXOVKWpqwejHvWn1-2F3qFhsV-2FmaEkQjQPr-2FMffelBPPeLb2a-2BQnbGML-2Be3VxVQoAKRnilWBDdIQJz6-2FRjOIMGrrcv-2Fv8zp8ggLbjawNQuzUw-2Bk6HCLcIKxmkoinVKxvuge-2F7hYKewWs-2FA9hAmne3nlBFPWzEWzFP7vj0o549-2FygYBw2DqdjNH3yMWjyN7VFHTADDQqYa-2BCQeZRjY3hcxhCzo1FcEQyLxP5x2HVxLf-2FybQXJz4qp9B8-2FPzzu4nH0naUr8gcxk3bnBC-2FA1hjh6AzLulNes-2BepwQW2PGaBMhiP863Z2bFwSzDpEaCfAuze1UOvKuaASpU-2BPfOf9cOrYT-2F1s4mr26LAIEMAiE7vhnnfhDX8lOoBS-2Bg288jtP321zR-2FFM3oJCRxnggYtgqRBSas6XpEUpqcvZDKI-2BWlgTrmmJ0nRha7R4j69hJ-2BHeeD3ehpYHw5aR8hK-2Bikd0iBt3kbT-2BtpHIL8MCmiJ8sY-2B62wiicP4K6CH1fdLhYHce9GPDWhw10TDaKStRaKdb-2Fg-3D-3D).
Our treatment of LGBTQ+ people in this country belies our claim that we are a land of equality and respect for human rights. We cannot pretend to be an example for the world while we continue to tolerate the persecution of our neighbors here at home.
As LGBTQ+ History Month comes to a close, I ask that we all reflect on what on what it means to be American. To me, being American means fighting inequality and standing up to bullies. It means recognizing and embracing our differences and taking individual action to ensure an equitable society for all of us. It means sticking our necks out for people we don't know. It means showing our neighbors empathy and love whenever and wherever we can.
What does being American mean to you? With gratitude, Peter

body:
|

| [](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGKG2X3EMhhTxmRleDmDB4T0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191028_newsletter&n=1)
# Campaign Highlights & Happenings
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGIPDQjl9X9navM3oz25K5SU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191028_newsletter&n=2)
### Governor Weld has been busy campaigning this week! If you missed all the coverage, or want to know where Bill will be next, read on!
| | [SUPPORT BILL →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGIPDQjl9X9navM3oz25K5SU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191028_newsletter&n=3)
---
## In the News: A Few of This Week's Stories
### ABC News: _3 GOP challengers take roadshow to pro-Trump Tennessee_
"Three Republican longshots challenging President Donald Trump in 2020 made a roadshow stop in the liberal-leaning capital of pro-Trump Tennessee."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=cTomZN3YTronSSAYl7jqNURytNlqhXOR2GwP-G9cfNlTDyQYUSd1io635J52jfUBILgErFaWwtLQwJpIUnq4JlUjRKdh7s3i1QcnP4JPKi_h67TIkmEuMAPblDg2P5bY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191028_newsletter&n=4)
### Forbes: _Two Republicans Challenging Trump in 2020 Support Impeachment_
"Bill Weld and Joe Walsh said they support the impeachment of Donald Trump, while Mark Sanford disagreed, as the three challengers to Trump for the 2020 GOP nomination squared off during a debate at Forbes’ 30 Under 30 summit in Detroit Monday."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6NS2bKpYnMmDAAaH_sla51PiJRX8pHNGCd4xNEqZHNgKiKr2rix6LxXwqJNwS60zpvs05aXv4kfHNRtbhNWi2jbFLAcCxieiMmN5yKXJFnI1CwWJC38JNE9h1hBKxPtdLNuhJ9IeJuzTpDYYHnTkt4XuFiaa3utUxy6hl71HiHa7H__raQzg5-DmZtTsgcLK&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191028_newsletter&n=5)
### Nashua Telegraph _GOP primary hopeful Bill Weld talks gerrymandering, electoral college, voter suppression at town hall_
"Had Florida had ranked choice voting in the 2000 presidential election, Democratic contender Al Gore would almost certainly have won the state, and therefore become America’s 43rd president, former Mass. Gov. William Weld told a roomful of guests at a Nashua town hall""

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=U7GdQH1viGs67rgNurkvfgJOqlAfeMMhzd0-RZRIqgOePtTSOWneUM2BaM8IGMMh3ODUlC6n61Lpbzl_gdwgPXw_qhag3trXxxMS7WXfLpm66S4t6DpOZ1C8un7RMhRv412lPuokON70OnYdcGGXyjoTA7nn7vgr_yvJG0rUfyNoNXMInxmls3TGnN1MqCEip9Wo01c7JTq0-J8WI2FqjQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191028_newsletter&n=6)
### Boston Globe: _Bill Weld says country 'is never going to be able to breathe a sigh of relief' unless Trump is removed from office_
"William F. Weld called Sunday for the impeachment inquiry against President Trump in the US House to continue and for the Republican-led Senate to remove Trump from office..."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=M_ahLUVJ8XpyMWq3jSlm0r99fyZUrGCdNxO3ZPQevgSgJXQjPomaG09J7ynjia25WlU_2VEH-OkkjNu1yj8Oher44zx1pB7HiW5ilK3GqqQaLi5nrMrDHerrmQCsuVucRryw6uMAeETsQ8ut4fOoBedlhofOxHC3u0Ga-CE5dPA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191028_newsletter&n=7)
### Yahoo Finance: _Bill Weld: Impeachment of Trump is 'our insurance policy'_
"Former governor and Republican presidential candidate Bill Weld weighs in on the impeachment inquiry of President Trump."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=_mp5wsVVwmCY0brIchIlFmeKsE_ko_fqcHMXKVHDnonCznE2yyMvBIyD5QKW4VSfWlII_D4f9XMUWNHdgUObxHGFnSGplliGKYwuUKtFkpLlN9c1mIOG7jbz_DWggEbq&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191028_newsletter&n=8)
### Fox News: _GOP Trump challenger Bill Weld on Dems' impeachment push: 'I think it's time' to go ahead with inquiry._
"2020 Republican presidential candidate Bill Weld expressed support Tuesday for the impeachment push by House Democrats, saying 'it's time' to move forward to a vote."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7GZSwuFiz8ztsw9jJ6gooC1GSJ4weh6Z2BZZQjYI2hrxQKqUpvFFsf8RlQ92XJXmXQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191028_newsletter&n=9)
|
---
### Forbes Under 30 Summit Law and Policy Forum
Monday, October 28th Detroit, MI 5:10 PM |
### Heronfield Academy Town Hall
Tuesday, October 29th Hampton Falls, NH 6:30 PM Open to the public [RSVP required](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWWB7S2LoRPvwIk8K0EQxYDwNyi4YkBbsJgn2s9Pf0WIOo-GhXPRe3iymSJtOqcpuhTJ3noWpUh-qf3apiXQvNnzYqCGtTz8-sqrQgQP4xzAe3k--Amu-tYsOYmpvdKUH4FMcFodtXn1f0c22BrKrDVM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191028_newsletter&n=10)
### Plymouth Town Hall
Saturday, November 2nd Lucky Dog Tavern and Grille Plymouth, NH 11:30 AM Open to the public [RSVP here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWRJD_s84LnJL4E4k7q8Ku-Irb6_7Pvl8_nBx5nU1Q-lyq-mwfexYhrbXBrts2fTBnC6lcMglfZw4Ui2NsTiNk-d7xwdTnbqFpikVPxdZIyOnft0HJBVp8RR46_OtC1kDBf1l1jmdBvQi4AMyO-gIi0k&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191028_newsletter&n=11) |
### Meet and Greet at Private Residence
Saturday, November 2nd Orford, NH 2:00 PM Open to the public Please email jyates@weld2020.org for more details
### No Labels Problem Solver Convention
Sunday, November 3rd Hilton Doubletree Manchester, NH 12:00 PM Open to the public [Register here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=UeCyiN02R9lNLXDAZRS5jGz_V_ljl8j1YTZEw9Q3OQw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191028_newsletter&n=12)

Yahoo Finance: Bill Weld: Impeachment of Trump is 'our insurance policy' "Former governor and Republican presidential candidate Bill Weld weighs in on the impeachment inquiry of President Trump." name: Mike Turner
subject: Important Deadline in 3 days!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Congress continues to be stalled because of Adam Schiff's fabricated impeachment investigation. This circus show needs to end!
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[**Important Deadline in 3 days!** ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=29&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Peter,
I'm Mike Turner, and I'm running for reelection right here in the Miami Valley!
[_**My campaign is facing the most important fundraising deadline to date on Thursday night at 11:59 PM!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**We need you help!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Will you join with hundreds of patriots who have already supported my reelection efforts with a [_**grassroots donation today?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=33&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
I'm committed to working for the people of Miami Valley and Southwest Ohio. I have fought each and every day to bring more jobs and funding to Wright-Patterson Air Force Base and the Dayton area. I have also led on the important issue of eradicating the opioid epidemic in our state.
My opponent is a Washington lobbyist who would ally with Nancy Pelosi if elected. To defeat her in 2020, [_**I need to hit the fundraising goals that my team have set every month!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=32&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
My team has let me know that we are dangerously close to not making our goal this month. [_**In an effort to prevent this with three days remaining before this deadline, I am asking for your help!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
We need to win here. If we are not successful, [_**Pelosi and her Squad will push forward with their socialist policies like the Green New Deal and the 32 trillion dollar Medicare for All**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0).
Ohio cannot afford these policies that will bankrupt our future!
[_**Can I count on you to help us get across the finish line?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0) We must defend against the unlimited financial resources that liberal groups aim to pour into our district on my opponent's behalf.
[_**Any amount you may give is one step closer to reaching this important fundraising goal which will help us Keep Ohio Red in 2020!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=31&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_**[Yes! I'll donate $100 to Keep Ohio Red!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=35&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Yes! I'll donate $75 to Keep Ohio Red!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Yes! I'll donate $45 to Keep Ohio Red!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Yes! I'll donate Any Amount to Keep Ohio Red!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**_
Thank you,

Mike Turner
[**DONATE BEFORE THURSDAY 11:59 PM!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**[**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=30&ms=NDA5ODYyNDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjYwNDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: unprecedented upset
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I asked. Speaker Pelosi asked. Paul Begala asked. Khizr Khan asked. James Carville asked. Deb Haaland asked. Ted Lieu asked. Now I'm asking again. **That 's how absolutely critical this end-of-month deadline is to winning my race and flipping the Senate.** Since I announced, I've watched President Trump and Mitch McConnell make unprecedented moves to steal this seat. Now, more than ever, I need to know my strongest supporters are behind me and will defend our movement. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191028_em_fr_b2_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
[ _**Suggested Support: $5 >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191028_em_fr_b2_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
---

To fend off these Republican attacks, I need to come out of this month with an undeniable foundation of support.

Look -- you know I'll have your back every single day in the Senate. Will you have mine with $5 before my end-of-month deadline hits in 72 hours?

subject: We're making calls again!
body:
Good afternoon Peter!
We're making calls again this Wednesday, and we want you to be there! Last week, we had a pretty successful phone bank, this week, with your help, we can call even more people.

Sign up here (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/147991/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=e41d041aed-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_28_08_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-e41d041aed-32267927) , and join us at Marc's house from 5:30-8:30!
Count me in! (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/147991/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=e41d041aed-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_28_08_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-e41d041aed-32267927)
Never been to a phone bank before? No problem! Our staff will walk you through your first few calls, and make sure you know what you're doing!

See you there,

Marc

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump finally faces the public
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Trump went to the World Series Game 5 in Washington and was greeted by resounding boos from the crowd, reminding him of just how unpopular he is. This was one of the few times Trump stepped out of his "MAGA" bubble of rallies, the White House, and his own golf courses, and the true opinion of America smacked him right in the face. Trump seems to think he can get by with his usual routine of lies, misdirections, and attacks on opponents, but even Republicans are starting to tire of having to defend him at every turn. While it seems far off, Election Day 2020 is just one year away \-- we need to know exactly where the electorate stands on Trump so we can tailor our strategy to get him out of office: **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc5b/6e9863e8/15ffa19f/1db08801/4045850546/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/rN5CG4Dh") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc5b/6e9863e8/15ffa19f/1db08801/4045850546/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/rN5CG4Dh") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc5b/6e9863e8/15ffa19f/1db08800/4045850546/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191028c.ND-b&refcode2=RpqZkkpyKdBLYIn8qnsh")

name: John Cornyn
subject: Team Cornyn’s Day of Action: Sign Up Now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc
body:
If Democrats in Congress have shown you anything over the past month or two, it’s that they will NEVER change. As far as the leftists are concerned,
Friend,
Are you passionate about keeping Texas red in 2020, friend? If so, join us on Saturday, November 2 for our Team Cornyn Day of Action! We are partnering with the Abbott campaign and RPT’s Volunteer Engagement Project for this Red Alert TX event and we need your help.
We will be knocking on doors to spread our conservative message, learning new digital strategies for supporting my campaign and meeting fellow volunteers in your area. My campaign will be set up at five different locations in Denton, Williamson, Harris, Tarrant, and Dallas counties to meet you.
**I need supporters who are willing to step up to fend off the Democrats from flipping Texas blue. Will you sign up to attend one of my events?**
****[DAY OF ACTION: SIGN UP NOW](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=bbc46e03cd5f436ab775ac12e78cbabf&_e=dZfZCkckriOUVPCo20lkM99ZFl4TcH80NQbZmmG929nzkat5wwsyNnluTxgGmf4oVOx-qqHWnJr5N4DMfPUsyLqpGKmQP0FJZ3X9P89XRBIbveLMwr62bSEsbIs-U4mm9bQY30vj9jb8cu8cYcikk_fXcYTUK_VdNagKGzeQMKwBnZ4RZGNs2CURB33Jh2IN5BXiyG_-Ik4ncq7o7HWFDcsisliGBhhZelp5cfXlR6XaDVZ9d3k6nVGGp5ntNAoFTMdZVeXqC2CyipxayaHahPJqDcQItDMFoGbGqTaKSMv2fldw2De2yVj55v3SfozmNyHU4qZjM9xcQ81WMsRZJ1V6VnbN5uZ_kZcHND_eBgiklHZqk3aUT_D0ey-L0Yy6mOi26l1MAzbZ1XDj11W8QTSyGnxvzYC_R0VldCm-oo30RUUMgOQAh-ygqDusDHem3v3h7vgfbvgEFnTUdmrJyQ%3D%3D)** **
---
We must stop the Democrats from turning Texas into the next California. I need you to sign up and attend those events to show your support for our conservative values! If we don’t have many people showing up, my opponents will label our campaign as weak. Then, the media will pounce.
This is your chance to make a difference. Will you help tell your fellow Texans that John Cornyn rejects Californian liberalism and instead supports the hard-working, red-blooded Americans who make our state great?
****[FIND YOUR DAY OF ACTION SITE](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=bbc46e03cd5f436ab775ac12e78cbabf&_e=dZfZCkckriOUVPCo20lkM99ZFl4TcH80NQbZmmG929nzkat5wwsyNnluTxgGmf4oVOx-qqHWnJr5N4DMfPUsyLqpGKmQP0FJZ3X9P89XRBIbveLMwr62bSEsbIs-U4mm9bQY30vj9jb8cu8cYcikk_fXcYTUK_VdNagKGzeQMKwBnZ4RZGNs2CURB33Jh2IN5BXiyG_-Ik4ncq7o7HWFDcsisliGBhhZelp5cfXlR6W8fm7UB7KjVdk-WcvfvNdj1wFtyWhmxFPs2r5UwKbxUCoeQ8fBvOI1VhpI6dXyGX-zyKYQV1n3oc2g-erUnembDISvQ5dmmD5KdKOMGCzumKgM2ScH91pLpHDp9TArugSXMHSg916hj830AyN7xoBlUertqfbYwpu4oyo5GHsQyfWpryrNiHOt-nMhwgvSs7jjuuHHTD90UUtUUfcwtqwSG-LfYDwZ_3kAyXkPKGZ8eA%3D%3D)** **

With you on board, we’re one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we’re glad you’re on board. Now that you’re on Team Cornyn, make sure that you’re keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=bbc46e03cd5f436ab775ac12e78cbabf&_e=dZfZCkckriOUVPCo20lkM9S3PlX3v98ERuxrifjc7kLolAKO4u-_RX4SDzDoBfliCxvaNZkhLj2I4s2RrjxlCw3I5qleeWNvPfpWdYvHIb12nowHNioPsHtUOl5QvWVOcsW0wYakmQSx67hF7VQSGPcdXo2jx2eSohbPRMo7nA_rWVZ3jx4AXNi_Z1Px7WTpxN6NLBXCsdOImANh0JiWDQHTv9p6j0CHJvTnGQVmo9-nqzo7DbDo_3ud5boByzAK8PFNOxwgGS1fQL0OoWaZcw%3D%3D) and [Twitter](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=bbc46e03cd5f436ab775ac12e78cbabf&_e=dZfZCkckriOUVPCo20lkM3RKpz1ZKuZe8wyIGTfo_zWLrbs6WhIN_74LLEDm0Iw1uet1qMQ2QzQc1Eo6o8JfOM84LJ9J-xpzhA9QncMouZtwpXYzItcwhAXDf80BksgzYTdzQxx7UJmwBqVO9nRImZwHE3gcKfl7mSUunHg1JDpOl3kEvwS5vWctHprLXpkuinuAP2zSKwIX5d6kOBP24j_1LDc41Az9U7LVZISID1o0AJPGcyUtveKA1HGvfOGRnb8fkIIxfcjz8avJmyz1tg%3D%3D) – that way you’ll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you’re still reading this, we know you’re _really_ ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=bbc46e03cd5f436ab775ac12e78cbabf&_e=dZfZCkckriOUVPCo20lkM8NbPmLPxgKqX5K5aEkkE0xoBEqixm110xzArq9qumxikExSZc7X8pk4DPbXMNonpVMTsXRWBN_qIteHMWEJv1kbSDwkgROqZgy_uGnjOCsPefUy0ZRbQ0wy-6Ka8iQKvcxa4JQjrSBFeo-Hst46juK3XzVvwWHNoWDZrSwB8bkB454rZqiZOIQWieR96ebHadz-NpsrEMDRVguR1Ho1MJZ7pqsIX36j_4SiK5FDYMlOtWWw5d8ZWlNfth89z_-Qk0uWMr_ULxt863KjODZ0Sik%3D) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you’re pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=bbc46e03cd5f436ab775ac12e78cbabf&_e=dZfZCkckriOUVPCo20lkM99ZFl4TcH80NQbZmmG929nHEApq_rgJ6Ff5PJEJr2Cw8KXO1PxhPUsyEj_81in6IOUppSVAb7HSX27kb6FB7YU0nBgsOLQaLlpHFjV2uZUdQTAHUyuizk34nFYgjaq-muCLNi6oO_Vb1YhKRaMClk2NfYyio2YX72mApK-gBGcRlPrkL2srxMrJ58UasNP6OD9tm_m0CRAjbk-Ig3jGzwertLwIXV3IvH903K-jB7uPmquJoVd63KgJRvL6yjpb4x4cAxIlrNUVmVi6C_P5D9pC_RYJ2_ZYIYrMywJO1-GOfWmvVWhABpZxnztykcjZ3-3QrUxaufs_roTXilm5le_hPCcD-j7pMOkKl33-bUBioDgBDrGdszfUrllZyIDUng%3D%3D) and find out exactly how you can help. We’d be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Don’t want to receive additional updates? Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.johncornyn.com/e/eh?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=bbc46e03cd5f436ab775ac12e78cbabf&_e=dZfZCkckriOUVPCo20lkM99ZFl4TcH80NQbZmmG929kLtfE8kjre3smO7QguMZniaoYwF_8Cbx45AQ7uQTb7KpL8ozlzqovyAHIcxru58KnlGlfE5MdU0siEyw60q_Tk9UYgcKTqkPPuAbmAT8BnXMXj1o_SdzSeO9m3Skr5ZLKRE_GOiTMg9em6lRBX7LjvFy14AmjVcuZdqhmxb4djzz_GpDeJ7Cp4_GBrL0oKGKG9Q2SYNECrNp6KpwxTUUoK)... But we’d rather you stick around. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax deductible.

As far as the leftists are concerned, Friend, Are you passionate about keeping Texas red in 2020, friend? If so, join us on Saturday, November 2 for our Team Cornyn Day of Action! We are partnering with the Abbott campaign and RPT’s Volunteer Engagement Project for this Red Alert TX event and we need your help. We will be knocking on doors to spread our conservative message, learning new digital strategies for supporting my campaign and meeting fellow volunteers in your area. My campaign will be set up at five different locations in Denton, Williamson, Harris, Tarrant, and Dallas counties to meet you. I need supporters who are willing to step up to fend off the Democrats from flipping Texas blue. name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal=2C=20National=20Political=20&=20Organizing=20Director?=
subject: DNC Updates - October 28
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [democrats
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a45726827d6a/september272019-1535009?e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Partners -

I can hardly believe that it’s been a few weeks since my last update. There’s lots to share: how you can get your awesome activists engaged in GOTV _**now**_ for the November 2019 elections; a quick look back at last week’s fourth Democratic presidential primary debate; the 18 organizing events we held across the state in one and a half days; and a recap of our packed 2019 Women’s Leadership Forum!

But first a fun, important ask: The departments at the DNC are in a "friendly" competition with one another to see which team can get the most people to sign up for SMS updates. Will you help me by texting READY to 43367? This will also help to ensure that you’ll get substantive updates and notifications about upcoming events.

_**2019 Elections**_

In eight days, states around the country are voting in crucial elections, and we have some big important opportunities to win, especially in the south. I wasn’t at the DNC when Doug Jones won the U.S. Senate race in Alabama, but I absolutely remember the tears of joy and the relief I felt when it happened. I don’t need to reinforce for you the importance of our party returning its attention and resources to the south. We made historic investments in 2018. And our Democratic committees, including the Democratic Governors Association, the Democratic Attorneys General Association, the Democratic Lt Governors Association, Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, and others, have been hard at work investing and organizing to pick up seats up and down the ballot. So we need your help in reaching out to voters and getting to the polls on election day. Below I’m highlighting just a few of the races that will be difference makers. Please sign up below and help spread the word. You can help to make phone calls, knock on doors, and help get out the vote for Democrats.
* In **New Jersey** , all 80 general assembly seats are up and there are key Assembly races across the state. **[Sign up here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=439ab9a5a7&e=d6c5c7d7ec)to protect our super majority in New Jersey. **
* In **Kentucky** , we have the opportunity to put Democrat Attorney General Andy Beshear in the governor’s mansion. **[Sign up here to help](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=560d73d8a5&e=d6c5c7d7ec)flip the governor’s seat blue. **
* In **Louisiana** , we must reelect Governor John Bel Edwards and keep the governor's mansion blue. **[Sign up here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2032f69338&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to make phone calls before the Louisiana election. **
* In **Virginia** , we are two seats away from flipping the House of Delegates and two seats away from flipping state Senate. **[Sign up here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=fc8bd47668&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to help Democrats flip the chambers and win a Democratic trifecta in Virginia. **
* In **Mississippi** , we have the opportunity to put Attorney General Jim Hood in the governor’s mansion.**[Sign up here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1dede70fce&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to help make phone calls and flip the governor’s seat blue. We’re also looking for dedicated Democrats to serve as poll watchers on Election Day!** To volunteer, simply fill out the form below and complete a short virtual training. Once you are trained, you’ll receive an Election Day assignment and instructions for how to pick up your credentials. NOTE: You do NOT have to be an attorney or a registered Mississippi voter to be an inside poll watcher! If you're interested in poll watching,[ please sign up](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9b1816d5e5&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

Every action could be the deciding factor in these crucial elections. There is too much at stake to sit this one out.**If you’re in D.C. and interested in phone banking,[please sign up](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5b71601910&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to make evening calls between October 28 to November 5.** _**DNC Women’s Leadership Forum**_ Earlier this month, we gathered for the Women’s Leadership Forum, a two-day conference with training seminars, keynote addresses from the women who are shaping politics today, and the Women Will Vote Gala. We heard from Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Vice President Joe Biden, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand, and more than a dozen women who flipped House seats in 2018! Additionally, the training day featured panels on organizing, social media messaging, and grassroots fundraising. Special thanks to our partners who spoke at and attended WLF!
_**Ohio!**_ This political & organizing team hosted _**17 events**_ over two days in Ohio around the debate! ****
These events included: standing in solidarity with our union brothers and sisters to walk the **[picket line at the UAW Strike in West Chester](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7f1c5a3253&e=d6c5c7d7ec), [a gun violence prevention discussion in Dayton with Mayor Whaley](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a508f2e3c5&e=d6c5c7d7ec), a rural roundtable at Mac Acres Dairy Farm** with advocates and leaders on agricultural and the issues facing rural communities, and **a stop for ice cream and a chat at[Columbus-grown Jeni's Splendid Cream with Jeni's Founder Jeni Britton Bauer](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=bbc444d028&e=d6c5c7d7ec). ** The day continued with a **[Voter Protection Training for black women community leaders](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=bdc1593057&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** through our Seat At The Table program, a **veterans roundtable** discussion on the intersectionality of veterans’ issues, a **New Americans roundtable** with attendees from Columbus’ diverse immigrant communities, an LGBTQ happy hour with Jim Obergefell, and [Chop it Up with African American men at a local barbershop](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1b38aea664&e=d6c5c7d7ec). This engagement program for Black men was launched in Ohio with two signature events in Columbus and Cleveland. ****
On Tuesday, we held a **Labor leaders roundtable lunch at the IBEW Local 683 with Congresswoman Joyce Beatty,** an **interfaith roundtable with Governor Ted Strickland** , a **youth leaders roundtable** , an **AAPI roundtable** with community leaders, and two debate watch parties including a **women’s watch party cohosted with the Ohio Democratic Party, the Franklin County Democratic Party, Planned Parenthood Action Fund and Planned Parenthood Advocates of Ohio**. And to close out Hispanic Heritage Month, we held a roundtable with Midwestern Latinx electeds and grasstops leaders.
_**Organizing Corps 2020**_ This summer, Organizing Corps 2020 -- with your support -- trained 300 corps members in ten cities to ensure we have the field force needed to take back the White House. Organizing Corps 2020 is back with Wave! We are excited to return to seven key battleground states for a one-week-on-campus bootcamp for current seniors/May 2020 grads. Get ready for the launch of **Organizing Corps 2020 Wave 2**! First up: Wisconsin and Arizona! The [application](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=15f6b20f8d&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for winter bootcamps in Arizona and Wisconsin are officially **_OPEN_ until November 12**! Please share the application far and wide with folks who may be a good fit for the program. ** ** As always, thank you so much for your continued partnership. In Solidarity, Muthoni and the DNC Political & Organizing Team Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [democrats.org](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7ec386aeeb&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. [Privacy Policy](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=28e6a6332b&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | | | | | | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4143ccc691&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b124a871bb&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1b160649a1&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Partners - I can hardly believe that it’s been a few weeks since my last update. There’s lots to share: how you can get your awesome activists engaged in GOTV now for the November 2019 elections; a quick look back at last week’s fourth Democratic presidential primary debate; the 18 organizing events we held across the state in one and a half days; and a recap of our packed 2019 Women’s Leadership Forum! But first a fun, important ask: The departments at the DNC are in a "friendly" competition with one another to see which team can get the most people to sign up for SMS updates. Will you help me by texting READY to 43367? This will also help to ensure that you’ll get substantive updates and notifications about upcoming events. 2019 Elections In eight days, states around the country are voting in crucial elections, and we have some big important opportunities to win, especially in the south. I wasn’t at the DNC when Doug Jones won the U.S. Senate race in Alabama, but I absolutely remember the tears of joy and the relief I felt when it happened. I don’t need to reinforce for you the importance of our party returning its attention and resources to the south. We made historic investments in 2018. And our Democratic committees, including the Democratic Governors Association, the Democratic Attorneys General Association, the Democratic Lt Governors Association, Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, and others, have been hard at work investing and organizing to pick up seats up and down the ballot. So we need your help in reaching out to voters and getting to the polls on election day. Below I’m highlighting just a few of the races that will be difference makers. Please sign up below and help spread the word. You can help to make phone calls, knock on doors, and help get out the vote for Democrats. In New Jersey , all 80 general assembly seats are up and there are key Assembly races across the state. protect our super majority in New Jersey. In Kentucky , we have the opportunity to put Democrat Attorney General Andy Beshear in the governor’s mansion. the governor’s seat blue. In Louisiana , we must reelect Governor John Bel Edwards and keep the governor's mansion blue. to make phone calls before the Louisiana election. In Virginia , we are two seats away from flipping the House of Delegates and two seats away from flipping state Senate. to help Democrats flip the chambers and win a Democratic trifecta in Virginia. In Mississippi , we have the opportunity to put Attorney General Jim Hood in the governor’s mansion. to help make phone calls and flip the governor’s seat blue. We’re also looking for dedicated Democrats to serve as poll watchers on Election Day! To volunteer, simply fill out the form below and complete a short virtual training. Once you are trained, you’ll receive an Election Day assignment and instructions for how to pick up your credentials. NOTE: You do NOT have to be an attorney or a registered Mississippi voter to be an inside poll watcher! If you're interested in poll watching,. Every action could be the deciding factor in these crucial elections. There is too much at stake to sit this one out.If you’re in D.C. and interested in phone banking, to make evening calls between October 28 to November 5. DNC Women’s Leadership Forum Earlier this month, we gathered for the Women’s Leadership Forum, a two-day conference with training seminars, keynote addresses from the women who are shaping politics today, and the Women Will Vote Gala. We heard from Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Vice President Joe Biden, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand, and more than a dozen women who flipped House seats in 2018! Additionally, the training day featured panels on organizing, social media messaging, and grassroots fundraising. Special thanks to our partners who spoke at and attended WLF! Ohio! This political & organizing team hosted 17 events over two days in Ohio around the debate! These events included: standing in solidarity with our union brothers and sisters to walk the , , a rural roundtable at Mac Acres Dairy Farm with advocates and leaders on agricultural and the issues facing rural communities, and a stop for ice cream and a chat at. The day continued with a through our Seat At The Table program, a veterans roundtable discussion on the intersectionality of veterans’ issues, a New Americans roundtable with attendees from Columbus’ diverse immigrant communities, an LGBTQ happy hour with Jim Obergefell, and . This engagement program for Black men was launched in Ohio with two signature events in Columbus and Cleveland. On Tuesday, we held a Labor leaders roundtable lunch at the IBEW Local 683 with Congresswoman Joyce Beatty, an interfaith roundtable with Governor Ted Strickland , a youth leaders roundtable , an AAPI roundtable with community leaders, and two debate watch parties including a women’s watch party cohosted with the Ohio Democratic Party, the Franklin County Democratic Party, Planned Parenthood Action Fund and Planned Parenthood Advocates of Ohio. And to close out Hispanic Heritage Month, we held a roundtable with Midwestern Latinx electeds and grasstops leaders. Organizing Corps 2020 This summer, Organizing Corps 2020 -- with your support -- trained 300 corps members in ten cities to ensure we have the field force needed to take back the White House. Organizing Corps 2020 is back with Wave! We are excited to return to seven key battleground states for a one-week-on-campus bootcamp for current seniors/May 2020 grads. Get ready for the launch of Organizing Corps 2020 Wave 2! First up: Wisconsin and Arizona! The for winter bootcamps in Arizona and Wisconsin are officially OPEN until November 12! Please share the application far and wide with folks who may be a good fit for the program. As always, thank you so much for your continued partnership. In Solidarity, Muthoni and the DNC Political & Organizing Team Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, . Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2019 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved. This is a test distribution list. Our mailing address is:** DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

body:
[1]Beto for America

Take a look at this.

Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight website is reporting that nine candidates
have officially made the November democratic debate. Here is who will be
on the debate stage when millions tune in, and who has some more work to
do:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40791?refcode=ema20191028-64178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=64178%2E444211%2EqXEuol ][IMG]

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40791?refcode=ema20191028-64178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=64178%2E444211%2EqXEuol ]As you can see, we’re still short. Can you rush $3 and
help us fight for Beto’s place on the debate stage? Every dollar counts as
we do everything possible to hit the final DNC requirement before the big
deadline.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40791?refcode=ema20191028-64178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=64178%2E444211%2EqXEuol ]Contribute $3

We wouldn’t continue to stress this unless it was critically important —
and it really is. The November debate will be the most important one yet.
Why? Because millions of Americans who have not yet tuned in to this
election will finally begin paying attention now that we’re less than 100
days out from the first votes being cast.

As it stands right now, they’ll see Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie
Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, Kamala Harris, Andrew Yang, Amy Klobuchar, Cory
Booker, and even Tom Steyer on the debate stage. But they won’t see Beto.

How do we change that? Grassroots supporters like you across the country
all decide that we’re going to collectively put forward the resources
necessary to make a massive push that moves the needle. With that, we can
fuel a people-powered effort to organize everywhere, run online ads that
are proven to work, and implement strategies to get our message out to
everyone so more Americans hear about Beto — and so we meet the DNC’s
final requirement.

Without your support, Beto could be left off the debate stage. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40791?refcode=ema20191028-64178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=64178%2E444211%2EqXEuol ]Can you
help us get over the line with an urgent $3 donation? Every
dollar you pitch in today will go towards running a robust campaign that
ensures we do everything possible to qualify for debates.

Candidates only have until one week before the debate to qualify. And we
won’t get a redo if we fall short.

Thanks,

–Team Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/40791?refcode=ema20191028-64178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=64178%2E444211%2EqXEuol ]Contribute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=64178%2E444211%2EqXEuol

P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

body:
Tom Cotton does not work for Arkansans.

| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-oct-eom?refcode=em191028graham&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

| Let's be clear, team: Tom Cotton isn't just bad for Arkansas. He's terrible for the entire country.

Tom Cotton signed on to Senator Lindsey Graham's resolution that denounces the impeachment inquiry -- and now we know where his loyalty lies.

Time and time again, Cotton has shown his true colors, and Arkansans are sick and tired of Cotton's gridlocked Washington ways. **But with the Senate majority on the line, Mitch McConnell and the GOP money machine will spend millions on super PACs and dark money groups to protect him.**

Arkansas and the rest of the country deserve senators who are loyal to the American people. If we're going to flip this seat and take back the Senate, we need to build a national network to take Tom Cotton down.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump speaks truth to terrorists
body:
Early yesterday morning, President Donald J. Trump delivered a major announcement to the Nation: Thanks to the unmatched bravery... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=81ba41ed10&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 28, 2019
---
| | |
# **President Trump speaks truth to terrorists**

**Early yesterday morning,** President Donald J. Trump delivered a major announcement to the Nation: Thanks to the unmatched bravery of America’s men and women in uniform, the terrorist leader of ISIS is dead.

** ****President Trump:** [‘The world is now a much safer place.’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5b925d7f9b&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Last night,** the United States brought the world’s number one terrorist leader to justice,” the President said. “Capturing or killing Baghdadi has been the top national security priority of my Administration.”

**Baghdadi and the cowards** around him are responsible for horrific and depraved acts of violence, including the deaths of Americans James Foley, Steven Sotloff, Peter Kassig, and Kayla Mueller. The group’s disgusting track record includes publicly beheading more than 300 people under Baghdadi, as well as carrying out genocidal murders of the Yazidi population and killing thousands of captured prisoners of war.

**There are no words** strong enough to condemn these monsters. The President’s own language was powerful and clear: “A brutal killer, one who has caused so much hardship and death, was violently eliminated . . . He will never again harm another innocent man, woman, or child."

**Some in the leftwing press** prefer to save their harshest language for President Trump instead of murderers. _The Washington Post’s_ original headline for Baghdadi’s “obituary” was chilling: “Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi, austere religious scholar at the helm of Islamic State, dies at 48.”

[**“I have no words,”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85e2a48a56&e=3ee4985eea) White House Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham said.

**ISIS terrorists** deserve no glorification. They deprived thousands of dignity in their deaths, and thus deserve no honor in their own. ISIS recruits shouldn’t be told that their evil leaders died heroically. They should be told the truth—that their masters died as cowards, traitors, and complete, wretched failures.

[_Arizona Republic:_ “Parents of Kayla Mueller grateful for death of ISIS leader”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8e4b48e733&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬****In case you missed it:** [President Trump’s full address to the Nation ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ab19cdc574&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Watch: President Trump honors the men and women in blue**

**President Trump** traveled to Chicago today for the International Association of Chiefs of Police Annual Conference, where he had a special message for the men and women who keep us safe each day.

**🎬****President Trump:** [An attack on law enforcement is an attack on all Americans](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=221d8df592&e=3ee4985eea)

**You****are the ones** that “defend our communities, chase down criminals, and keep America safe,” the President said to a crowd of thousands of officers. “You don’t hear it enough: You do an incredible job. The people in this country know it, and the people of this country love you.”

**Thanks to President Trump,** America’s communities are safer:
* After spiking for two years before he took office, the violent crime rate in America has dropped for two years in a row under President Trump, falling 4.6 percent.

* The murder rate has declined for two consecutive years under President Trump—after increasing in each of the prior two years.

* The number of robberies fell by more than 50,000 from 2016 to 2018 nationwide. And there were 286,000 fewer burglaries in 2018 than 2016.

**Now, President Trump** is establishing a new executive Commission on Law Enforcement and the Administration of Justice—the first such American commission on law enforcement in _half a century_.

[There’s been no better friend to law enforcement than President Trump.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=77e9e0dcdc&e=3ee4985eea)

** Watch:** [My Administration will always stand up for you!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4968bf8386&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **Today, President Trump declassified a picture of the wonderful dog that helped to capture and kill the****l****eader of ISIS, Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi** | October 28, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=accb9ff561&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3eba024a72&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=179e3b9b05)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
